## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / style

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo test` passes locally.
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` passes locally.
- [ ] Integration tests (`python .github/scripts/run_tests.py`) pass locally.
- [ ] Example programs (`.github/scripts/run_examples.sh`) pass locally.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` is updated if the change is user-facing.
- [ ] `README.md` / documentation is updated if needed.

## Notes

Any additional context, trade-offs, or follow-up work.
